section.div: Code repo for "WebArena: A Realistic Web Environment for Building Autonomous Agents"

This repository serves as a comprehensive guide to hackathons, offering valuable insights and resources for both beginners and experienced participants. It covers the essentials, such as how to find upcoming hackathons, tips for selecting the right event, and detailed preparation strategies.
